# ChessLM

ChessLM is a next-generation chess platform that allows valid chess games against advanced Large Language Models (LLMs).

## Features
- Play against OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and Grok.
- Real-time analysis.
- Grandmaster-level AI personas.

## Links
- Website: https://chesslm.vercel.app
- Code: https://github.com/ovishkh/ChessLM
